name: LangChain
one_liner: LangChain provides open-source frameworks and an enterprise agent engineering platform—including LangGraph and LangSmith—that enables developers and enterprises to build, deploy, and monitor production-grade AI agents.

ambiguities: Total funding is reported as $160M by Crunchbase, CBInsights, PitchBook, and TexAu (Seed $10M + Series A $25M + Series B $125M = $160M), but Tracxn and Sacra report $260M across 4 rounds—possibly including an undisclosed bridge or additional round; $160M used as the more widely cited figure from primary sources.
Headcount figures vary: GetLatka reports ~163 (as of late 2025/early 2026) vs. PitchBook's 136; 163 used as most recent estimate but flagged as low confidence.

Series B date: Fortune and CBInsights cite October 20, 2025; some secondary sources (Latenode) reference a July 2025 round at $100M with a $1.1B valuation, which may be a preliminary/leaked figure; the confirmed official announcement is October 20, 2025 at $125M / $1.25B.
